compositional_truth_check.findings: P3 (Pothos) is present with the rabbit anchor. P1 (String of Nickels) is present but appears dormant/bare. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or absent, showing only soil and debris.

systemic_losses: P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) show no visible foliage, suggesting systemic loss or total senescence.
new_introductions: Eggshell fragments observed in the central black pot as a soil amendment/calcium intervention.

plant_audit.p1_string_of_nickels: Pot contains soil and a sensor tag; no active foliage visible. Status: Dormant/Failed.
plant_audit.p2_p4_mexican_mint_silver_guest: Pot contains eggshell fragments and soil. No plant matter detected. Status: Systemic Loss.
plant_audit.p3_pothos: Single leaf remains visible next to the white rabbit anchor. Status: Critical/Stagnant.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of white eggshell fragments in the central pot. No fungal growth observed, but lack of vegetative cover suggests poor soil health or lack of light.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The Pothos leaf in P3 has remained static. The central pot (P2/P4) has remained devoid of foliage throughout the 5-day sequence, with eggshells appearing as a static intervention.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The lack of new growth, combined with the absence of foliage in P1, P2, and P4, indicates a failure of the biome. The Pothos in P3 is the only surviving specimen, but it shows no signs of active development.

anomalies: Eggshell debris in the central pot.
Total lack of visible plant matter in P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is in a state of severe decline. Only one leaf remains across the entire desk setup. The introduction of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil remediation, but there is no visual evidence of plant recovery or growth. The biome is currently non-productive.
